case_title: CHRISTINA LITTLE VS. AUGUSTO CHAVEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITTLE, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, AUGUSTO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-31-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-16-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-31-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
